findings: The GB200 NVL72 is configured with 72 GPUs in one rack and 18 dual GB200 compute nodes.
72 NVLink-connected Blackwell GPUs with 30 TB of unified memory over a 130 TB/s compute fabric create an exaFLOP AI supercomputer in a single GB200 NVL72 rack.
The GB200 NVL72 rack consists of 18 1U compute trays and 9 NVSwitch trays; each compute tray contains 2 Bianca boards (1 Grace CPU + 2 Blackwell GPUs each), totalling 72 GPUs per rack.
The DGX GB200 NVL72 is a single integrated rack with 72 GPUs, 36 CPUs, 18 NVSwitches, 72 InfiniBand NICs for the back-end network, and 36 BlueField-3 Ethernet NICs for the front-end network.
The NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 product listing specifies 72 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs and 36 NVIDIA Grace CPUs as part of the rack configuration.
